description: From the manufacturer PremiumCord USB - Micro USB connection cable Black USB connection cable, USB A / Micro USB BCu, AWG28, 2x shielded, m/ M, ULUSB a male USB micro B male, moulded housing, 4-core cable, double shielded, AWG28 - UL2725 White USB connection cable, USB A / Micro USB BCu, AWG28, 2x shielded, m/ M, ULUSB a male USB micro B male, moulded housing, 4-core cable, double shielded, AWG28 - UL2725 Black 90° USB connection cable, USB A/Micro USB B angled, USB A male angled USB micro B plug, moulded housing, 4-core cable, double shielded, AWG28 - UL2725 Options: Length: 0.2 / 0.5 / 0.7 / 1 / 1.8 / 2 / 3 / 5 m About us: A unique brand of cables, adapters and accessories for computers, audio videos, computer networks and telecommunications. We convince with a wide range that meets all applications, as well as with a perfect design and high-quality workmanship without compromise. The PremiumCord brand is a flagship of cable distribution KRUP computer. PremiumCord was born in 2006 with the idea of bringing a wide range of quality cables to the market in a simple but practical package. Thanks to our engineers, we have used many years of experience in this field and built a brand beyond the boundaries of the Czech Republic.
